title: spathelia wrightii
intro: Spathelia wrightii is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the Rutaceae family and commonly known as Wright's spathelia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Spathelia wrightii include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Spathelia wrightii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
